title: cola lissachensis
intro: Cola lissachensis, also known as the West African cola, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cola lissachensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as supporting digestion and improving circulation. The herbal preparations of Cola lissachensis typically involve drying the leaves and roots, and then using them to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
